feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CBAR only with full delivery
entry.content: CBAR delivery status (VBSTT-LFSTA_BEZ) is completed as soon as delivery is created. It doesn't check a GR.

entry.title: statical delivery date is not changing
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When we create PO in ME21N that time if we change delivery date statical delivery date is getting change, but when we change PO in ME22N that time it is not getting change automatically, even output not generated, PO unreleased in that case also it is not getting change. . is it standard SAP behave or any configuration missing.

entry.title: 7300002609- target quantity exceeded- logic required
entry.content:
test PR in STQ 7300002609- target quantity exceeded- logic required

during auto PO creation in me59n getting error message target quantity exceeded. pls let us know the logic for that error.

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: kob1 by the variant selection orders no actual line items were selected-KB420
entry.content: We use transaction kob1- Orders: Actual Line Items or S_ALR_87012993- Orders: Actual/Plan/Variance. When the selection variant orders is filled in selection parameter 'Order Group'  report returns error message KB420 "No actual line items were selected".  However there are actual line items by the orders which are contented in this order group when they  are filled in selection parameter Order. There are no issues with authorization.

entry.title: PO print preview not visible
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We getting error while checking print preview of the PO 4100015764 as "Field I881 does not exist in form".

 

Regards,

Azizur

entry.title: Internal order description is not visible in KOH3
entry.content:
Hi All,

in KOH3 we cannot see the description of internal orders which is visible in KOH2

entry.title: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance
entry.content: KOB1n and KOB1 is not matching with trial balance, while running kob1n report company code wise the balance is not zero but as per trial the balance is zero also, this is impacting financial closing.

entry.title: Quality lot Auto UD
entry.content: A few materials are reflecting in QA16, while some materials are not reflecting in QA16. But QA32 all material are Reflecting.

entry.title: We are facing issue while doing KKS1 for plant level, there is issue in one Internal Order
entry.content:
We are facing issue while doing KKS1 for plant level, there is issue in one Internal Order.

Please find attached document for reference.

entry.title: Not Able to Partial Retire Asset with T-code - F-92
entry.content:
Asset code – 1000044114
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

It is not able to do Partial Retire with T-code F-92 and Transaction Type is used 210

But It is working for different Asset code

Asset code – 1100068355
Company code – 1000
Acquisition date – 31.07.2026 Current Year

For this Asset code entry is posted successfully with Transaction Type 210

entry.title: KP26 Price Planning Error: Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While executing the transaction code KP26 we are getting the error "Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock) " in D3P system Message No. FINS_BTTYPE_CHECKS006 . So kindly check this issue & provide a solution.

Thanks & Regards

Sachin Patil

entry.title: KP26 Price Planning Error: Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While executing the transaction code KP26 we are getting the error "Check the customizing for Business Trans. Types in plan (Period lock) " in D3P system Message No. FINS_BTTYPE_CHECKS006 . So kindly check this issue & provide a solution.

Thanks & Regards

Sachin Patil

entry.title: Transaction KB21N – Location Currency Not As Expected
entry.content: When performing a Direct Activity Allocation using transaction KB21N on a Production Order, the system calculates an unexpected local currency amount (ARS). The computed value does not match the expected value based on exchange rate type 'P' maintained in transaction OB08.

entry.title: Error AA629 ARAW
entry.content:
Dear Team

I know there are KBA articles like  3072527  related to this error, but unfortunately the description is not clear.

Could you please support me in understanding why this is not working? I am facing an issue in the test environment when I try to decrease the asset APC amount.

With revaluation, the gain posting works (movement type 800), but the opposite scenario — revaluation with loss — does not work.

Error is : Enter a transaction type that matches the values of fixed asset 300000000153-0000300000000153-0000

Movemtn type 892

Message No. AA629

Could you please help me understand why this is happening?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Alexander

entry.title: Storage Bin Specific Counting Job – Repeated Counting of Bins
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We have scheduled a background job for storage bin-specific counting. In the variant, the maximum number of products to be counted is set to 2, and a 60-day period has been maintained for the selection of bins that have not been counted.However, based on the attached example, we can see that bins SL110 and SL97 have been selected and counted repeatedly, which is not the expected behavior.For your reference, I have attached the variant configuration and the Physical Inventory (PI) document details.Details:Warehouse Number: PL01Physical Inventory Procedure: HLVariant Name: PL01_SLT-COUNCould you please review this and help us understand why these bins are being selected repeatedly despite the configured settings?Please let me know if you require any additional information from our side.

entry.title: MI21 Print not working
entry.content:
The issue of Printing Inventory docs with MI21 is only in Fiori, when printing this from GUI there is not problem.

Also, in Fiori if we do Print Preview, is ok, and allow us to print but only from the Print command within the preview mode. The other Print Command on the header give the error.

entry.title: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part
entry.content: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part in migo

entry.title: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part
entry.content: technical clearing entry posting for oprational part but not valuated part

entry.title: Advanced Return Intercompany Credit
entry.content: We are using the Advanced Return process.  Sometimes we need to credit the source supplier through an intercompany credit.  There is no copy control LR2 to IG
